task_text: Find the population of Tokyo and the population of New York City, then compare which city has a larger population and by how much.

dependency_graph.task_analysis: Two independent data-collection subtasks (Tokyo population, NYC population) feed into a comparison subtask that needs both results.

subtasks.instruction: Go to Google and search for the current population of Tokyo. Report the population figure you find.

subtasks.description: Look up New York City's population
subtasks.instruction: Go to Google and search for the current population of New York City. Report the population figure you find.
Compare the populations of Tokyo and New York City and determine which city is larger and by how much.

aggregation.instruction: Summarize the population comparison between Tokyo and New York City, including exact figures and the difference.
